heading: // Notifications
empty: No notification channels configured. Add one to receive alerts.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Send alerts to a Slack channel via incoming webhook

email.name: Email
email.description: Send alerts via SMTP to one or more recipients

webhook.name: Webhook
webhook.description: POST alert payloads to any HTTP endpoint

ntfy.name: ntfy
ntfy.description: Push notifications via ntfy.sh or a self-hosted ntfy server

gotify.name: Gotify
gotify.description: Push notifications via a self-hosted Gotify server

form.name: Channel Name
form.smtpInsecureWarning: Messages and connection metadata will cross the network without TLS. Credentials are not allowed in this mode.
form.smtpInsecurePolicyWarning: This channel requests insecure SMTP, but the backend policy currently blocks it. Choose a TLS mode before saving.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Channel
deleteDialog.body: This will permanently remove the channel {name}. This action cannot be undone.

errors.smtpPortInvalid: SMTP port must be a whole number between 1 and 65535.
errors.smtpPassRequired: SMTP password is required when a username is configured.
errors.recipientsRequired: At least one recipient email address is required.
errors.recipientsInvalid: Recipients must be plain email addresses separated by commas or semicolons.
errors.smtpInsecurePolicyBlocked: The backend policy does not permit insecure SMTP.
errors.smtpInsecureCredentialsForbidden: Remove the SMTP username and password before using insecure SMTP.
errors.smtpInsecureAckRequired: Type INSECURE SMTP exactly to acknowledge the risk.
